milestone: Artwork Gallery starter Scene renamed Story -> Gallery
slice: The Builder & Studio Alignment Sprint's neutral default for the Artwork Gallery template's starter Scene, "Story," turned out to be its own mismatch once actually seen in Studio's Screen 2 Representation carousel: it reads (and, with the default masks thumbnail glyph, visually looks) like the Tell a Story Creation Type, not an artwork showcase -- found live, from a user's already-published "My Artwork Gallery" World showing a masks icon and the word "Story" in its own preview carousel. Renamed TEMPLATE_STARTER_SCENE's artwork-gallery entry to "Gallery" -- still not part of the flagged Showcase/Portrait/Quote trio, while actually describing the template. Only affects new Artwork Gallery projects going forward; an already-published World keeps its own Scene's existing name until an author renames it via the Scenes screen and rebuilds/republishes. Verified via Playwright: a freshly created Artwork Gallery project's starter Scene (and thus its default Representation) is named "Gallery"; goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged.
